To implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt, we need to create a simple    
version control system. This will include basic commands such as init, add,     
commit, and log. Below is the implementation in TypeScript.                     

main.ts                                                                         

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@                                                                
+#!/usr/bin/env node                                                            
+                                                                               
+import * as fs from 'fs';                                                      
+import * as path from 'path';                                                  
+                                                                               
+const MINIGIT_DIR = '.minigit';                                                
+const INDEX_FILE = path.join(MINIGIT_DIR, 'index.json');                       
+const COMMIT_FILE = path.join(MINIGIT_DIR, 'commits.json');                    
+                                                                               
+function init() {                                                              
+    if (fs.existsSync(MINIGIT_DIR)) {                                          
+        console.error('Repository already initialized.');                      
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+    fs.mkdirSync(MINIGIT_DIR);                                                 
+    fs.writeFileSync(INDEX_FILE, JSON.stringify({}, null, 2));                 
+    fs.writeFileSync(COMMIT_FILE, JSON.stringify([], null, 2));                
+    console.log('Initialized empty minigit repository.');                      
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+function add(file: string) {                                                   
+    if (!fs.existsSync(file)) {                                                
+        console.error(`File ${file} does not exist.`);                         
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+    const index = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(INDEX_FILE, 'utf8'));             
+    index[file] = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8');                               
+    fs.writeFileSync(INDEX_FILE, JSON.stringify(index, null, 2));              
+    console.log(`${file} added to the staging area.`);                         
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+function commit(message: string) {                                             
+    const index = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(INDEX_FILE, 'utf8'));             
+    if (Object.keys(index).length === 0) {                                     
+        console.error('No changes staged.');                                   
+        return;                                                                
+    }                                                                          
+    const commits = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(COMMIT_FILE, 'utf8'));          
+    commits.push({ message, files: Object.keys(index), timestamp: new          
Date().toISOString() });                                                        
+    fs.writeFileSync(INDEX_FILE, JSON.stringify({}, null, 2));                 
+    fs.writeFileSync(COMMIT_FILE, JSON.stringify(commits, null, 2));           
+    console.log(`Committed ${message}`);                                       
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+function log() {                                                               
+    const commits = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(COMMIT_FILE, 'utf8'));          
+    commits.forEach((commit: any, index: number) => {                          
+        console.log(`${index + 1}: ${commit.message} (${commit.timestamp})`);  
+    });                                                                        
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+const args = process.argv.slice(2);                                            
+if (args.length === 0 || !['init', 'add', 'commit', 'log'].includes(args[0])) {
+    console.error('Usage: minigit <command> [options]');                       
+    process.exit(1);                                                           
+}                                                                              
+                                                                               
+switch (args[0]) {                                                             
+    case 'init':                                                               
+        init();                                                                
+        break;                                                                 
+    case 'add':                                                                
+        if (args.length !== 2) {                                               
+            console.error('Usage: minigit add <file>');                        
+            process.exit(1);                                                   
+        }                                                                      
+        add(args[1]);                                                          
+        break;                                                                 
+    case 'commit':                                                             
+        if (args.length !== 2) {                                               
+            console.error('Usage: minigit commit <message>');                  
+            process.exit(1);                                                   
+        }                                                                      
+        commit(args[1]);                                                       
+        break;                                                                 
+    case 'log':                                                                
+        log();                                                                 
+        break;                                                                 
+}                                                                              
                                                                                

Makefile                                                                        

                                                                                
minigit: main.ts                                                                
                                                                                
    tsc main.ts                                                                 
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
clean:                                                                          
                                                                                
    rm -rf *.js *.map .minigit                                                  
                                                                                
                                                                                
                                                                                
.PHONY: minigit clean                                                           
                                                                                

To run the tests, use the following command:                                    

                                                                                
@@ -0,0 +1 @@                                                                   
+bash test-v1.sh                                                                
                                                                                

This implementation provides a basic version control system with init, add,     
commit, and log commands. The repository is stored in a hidden directory        
.minigit with two files: index.json for tracking changes and commits.json for   
storing commit history.
